name: Castle Peak Mining Ltd.
summary: Castle Peak Mining Ltd., a junior exploration company, engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral properties in Ghana, Africa. The company explores for gold properties. It has an option agreement to acquire interest in the Kunsu project located in the Ahafo Ano South District of the Ashanti Region of Ghana. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Port Coquitlam, Canada.
